title: FIFA World Cup in Canada: full list of 26-player roster
original_text:
Alphonso Davies will lead Canada in the 2026 FIFA World Cup as the men’s roster was revealed Friday night.
Canada will kick off the tournament against Bosnia and Herzegovina in Toronto on June 12.
Head coach Jesse Marsch said earlier this week that Davies, who is recovering from a hamstring injury, will likely miss the opening match.
Here’s who will don the red and white:
Forwards
Promise David, Brampton, Ont.
Tami Oluwaseyi, Mississauga, Ont.
Cyle Larin, Brampton, Ont.
Jonathan David, Ottawa, Ont.
Defenders
Joel Waterman, Aldergrove, B.C.
Moïse Bombito, Montreal, Que.
Alfie Jones, Hillcrest, Alta.
Derek Cornelius, Ajax, Ont.
Richie Laryea, Toronto, Ont.
Alphonso Davies, Edmonton, Alta.
Alistair Johnston, Aurora, Ont.
Niko Sigur, Burnaby, B.C.
Luc de Fougerolles, Montreal, Que.
Midfielders
Liam Millar, Brampton, Ont.
Ismaël Koné, Montreal, Que.
Stephen Eustáquio, Leamington, Ont.
Jacob Shaffelburg, Port Williams, N.S.
Jonathan Osorio, Brampton, Ont.
Tajon Buchanan, Brampton, Ont.
Ali Ahmed, Toronto, Ont.
Jayden Nelson, Brampton, Ont.
Nathan Saliba, Longueuil, Que.
Mathieu Choinière, St-Alexandre, Que.
Keepers
Maxime Crépeau, Candiac, Que.
Dayne St. Clair, Pickering, Ont.
Owen Goodman, Allison, Ont.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
